text.message: Blacks gonna take army soon if we keep trading him
Green is about to have army and road
To make u guys happier, I got rid of one of my useless devs
cant make me happier, you already threw so hard to red. game was over 3 cycles ago
U shouldn’t have been popping devs
Your setup isn’t even suited to devs
and yet here i am with army
You forced me to have to rob u
And slow u down, it’s my only winning path to have army
bro there is no such thing as forcing someone to rob you
If I have to have army to win, I can’t win unless I take it from you
and if my build isnt suited for devs, you shouldve had faith you would get army
I'm full obsessed never a single.dev
gameplay has just been awful this game
Yeah green tried to play a dev game when they had a road setup
lmao i repeat, i have army. I also have incredibly good ows produciton. so sorry you couldnt see im army as much as im road
im suited to whatever tf i want
I need to play my win conditions and u need to recognize that
I camt win anymore no more vps
jesus this is almost report worthy
but i actually believe that you believe this garbge
I already told u I have to have army
If I don’t I have no chance of winning
Man this is what 1600 elo is like lol
get me out of here. Hate new seasons
If I’m not going for army I have no chance
